leads.email_subject: Saw the Real Estate Marketing Specialist listing
leads.email_body:
Hi,

I came across your listing for a Real Estate Marketing Specialist to run paid ads, email, landing pages, and lead funnels across your brands. That's a lot to load onto one new hire, especially with the ramp-up time before they know your positioning.

I put together a quick page showing how I'd handle the landing pages, funnels, and SEO side as a running system instead:
https://organic-theory.vercel.app/pitch/nw-marketing-solutions

You can see how I work at https://organic-theory.vercel.app

No pressure either way, just thought it might save you a hiring cycle.

Gabriel Balenton | Organic Theory Founder
